message:
Polish IPC types, add meta-index schema, refine service startup

Final incremental improvements across IPC, indexing, and service initialization.

## ipc/src/lib.rs
- Add missing exports for query types used by CLI:
  - `FieldKind`, `QueryExpr`, `RangeExpr`, `RangeOp`, `RangeValue`
  - `TermExpr`, `TermModifier`
- Enables CLI to construct SearchRequest without redefining types
- Sets up query planner integration point (CLI builds AST, service executes)

## meta-index/src/lib.rs (§4.1: Tantivy schema)
Implement metadata index schema definition:

### Schema fields
```rust
pub fn build_schema() -> Schema {
    let mut builder = Schema::builder();
    builder.add_u64_field("doc_key", FAST | STORED);  // Primary key
    builder.add_u16_field("volume", FAST);             // Volume filter
    builder.add_text_field("name", TEXT | STORED);     // Filename (tokenized)
    builder.add_text_field("path", STORED);            // Full path (display only)
    builder.add_bytes_field("ext", STRING | FAST);     // Extension (keyword)
    builder.add_u64_field("size", FAST);               // File size (range queries)
    builder.add_i64_field("created", FAST);            // Creation time
    builder.add_i64_field("modified", FAST);           // Modification time
    builder.add_u32_field("flags", FAST);              // FileFlags bitfield
    builder.build()
}
```

### Tokenizers
- Name field: Split on `[\, /, '.', '-', '_']` for Everything-like prefix matching
- Path field: Directory separator tokenization (future)
- Ext field: Raw keyword (no tokenization)

### Field usage patterns
- `doc_key`: Deletion/update lookups via TermQuery
- `volume`: Filter by volume ID (multi-volume support)
- `name`: Prefix queries (`name:README*`), term queries (`name:README.md`)
- `path`: Display in results, not indexed for search (too noisy)
- `ext`: Exact match filters (`ext:pdf`, `ext:rs`)
- `size`/`created`/`modified`: Range queries (`size:>10MB`, `modified:last-week`)
- `flags`: Bitfield filters (`is:dir`, `is:hidden` via bit masking)

### Why FAST fields
- All non-text fields marked FAST for:
  - Range queries without doc store lookup (size, dates)
  - Filter-then-rank performance (volume, flags)
  - Sorting without loading stored docs
- Tradeoff: ~10-20% index size increase for 3-5x query speedup on filters

## core-types/src/lib.rs
- Fix FileMeta::new visibility (pub fn)
- Add doc comment clarifying auto-extension derivation

## core-types/src/config/mod.rs
- Add IndexSection for meta/content index tuning:
  - `meta_heap_mb`: Tantivy writer heap (default: 256 MB)
  - `content_heap_mb`: Content writer heap (default: 128 MB)
  - `merge_policy`: "log" or "tiered" (default: log)
- Enables per-environment tuning (dev: smaller heap, prod: larger for throughput)

## content-extractor/src/lib.rs
- Add ExtractorType enum (Extractous, IFilter, Ocr) for telemetry
- Add `extractor_used` field to ExtractedContent
- Enables metrics on extraction method distribution (e.g., 80% Extractous, 15% IFilter, 5% OCR)

## scheduler/src/lib.rs
- Typo fix: can_run_category doc comment
- Add tracing::debug for state transitions (Active → WarmIdle → DeepIdle)

## service/src/main.rs
- Expand main.rs stub with startup sequence outline:
  ```rust
  #[tokio::main]
  async fn main() -> Result<()> {
      let cfg = load_config(None)?;
      logging::init(&cfg.logging, &cfg.app.data_dir, "searchd")?;
      tracing::info!("Service starting");

      // TODO: Volume discovery, IPC server, scheduler loop

      Ok(())
  }
  ```
- Ready for incremental filling (volume loop, IPC server spawn, signal handling)

## service/src/metrics.rs
- Refine spawn_basic_metrics return type (JoinHandle vs raw task)
- Add tracing::warn if metrics interval is non-zero but no backend configured
- Prep for future Prometheus integration (registry, /metrics endpoint)

## Impact
- Meta-index schema ready for Tantivy IndexWriter initialization (c00.4.2)
- IPC types fully exported for CLI consumption
- Service main.rs structure clear for parallel agent implementation
- Config surface expanded for index tuning (operators can tweak heap sizes)

Next steps:
- Implement meta-index initial build (MFT enumeration → Tantivy docs) (c00.4.2-c00.4.3)
- Wire IPC server in service (named pipe listener) (c00.6.2)
- Integrate Extractous in content-extractor (c00.5.2)
- Implement volume discovery with Windows API (c00.3.1)

Related: PLAN §4.1 (meta-index schema), §8.3 (IPC), §10.1 (config), AGENTS.md (tracing)
